owner_operator_stated: The site at this exact address (7923 Lincoln Ave #100, Skokie, IL 60077) now shows 'Skokie Dental' operated by Dr. Tariq Hafeez, not Louis I. Freeman. Freeman's own presumed website (dentistinskokie.com) is currently unreachable (connection refused).
notes: Record entity 'LOUIS I. FREEMAN D.D.S., PC', phone (847) 675-7040, address 7923 Lincoln Ave, Skokie IL 60077. The vendor hint site (skokiesmiles.com) matches the record's street address exactly but lists a different phone (847-881-6636) and a different dentist (Dr. Tariq Hafeez, 'Skokie Dental'), not Louis Freeman. Multiple directories (Healthgrades, WebMD, Yelp) still list Dr. Freeman at 7923 Lincoln Ave with (847) 675-7040, and Freeman may also/instead practice at 9933 Lawler Ave or 9235 Skokie Blvd per other listings, but Freeman's own site is dead and the address's live current site belongs to a different named dentist/brand. Treated as a practice successor/ownership conflict at this address, not a verified website for the named record.

Record's vendor_website_hint (Dentistbridgeportchicago.com / 'Bridgeport Smiles Family Dental Care') is an unrelated Chicago Bridgeport-neighborhood practice, not corroborated by address or phone -- discarded. Address match (9327 Skokie Blvd Unit C, Skokie, IL 60077) on dental-matters.com corroborates the record; Dr. Maha Khaden is listed on the team page there. Record's phone (773) 814-4205 does not match the site's published phone (847-227-8277), but that (773) number is a co-located provider's (Dr. Mazher Syed) individually-registered NPI contact number at the same address, not evidence of a different practice. This is a multi-provider general dentistry group practice (Dental Matters), no DSO brand affiliation stated.

Record's listed address (1149 Weiland Rd) differs from the current site's address (135 N. Arlington Heights Rd, Suite 185, Buffalo Grove, IL 60089), but the phone number (847) 634-4773 matches exactly, satisfying the corroboration rule via phone. Appears to be a within-Buffalo-Grove relocation under the same name/phone/doctors, not an ownership change. About Us page does not state an explicit owner.
